fastembed.conclusion: fastembed npm 2.1.0 ships embeddings only; no Reranker class, enum, or helper anywhere in lib/ or .d.ts files.

alternatives.name: @huggingface/transformers
alternatives.rationale: Mature ONNX-based TS/JS path with first-class cross-encoder reranker support (e.g. Xenova/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2, BAAI/bge-reranker-base). Recommended primary target for Phase 4.

alternatives.name: onnxruntime-node
alternatives.rationale: Direct ONNX runtime; we'd ship BGE/MS-MARCO weights + tokenizer ourselves. Higher perf ceiling, higher implementation cost.

fastembed.phase4_impact: Phase 4 design needs amendment: switch from fastembed to @huggingface/transformers as primary, onnxruntime-node as fallback.

sqlite_vec.conclusion: sqlite-vec 0.1.9 loads cleanly on darwin-arm64. API uses getLoadablePath() (not loadablePath() as the plan checklist guessed).
sqlite_vec.phase3_impact: Phase 3 can proceed; call sites must use getLoadablePath, not loadablePath.
ci_followup: Decide stance on linux-musl (Alpine): graceful degradation or self-build

overall.notes: Fastembed reranker absent — Phase 4 plan needs design tweak to use @huggingface/transformers. sqlite-vec works on tested platform; other platforms need CI verification before merge gate.

narrative_writeup: docs/superpowers/specs/v1-dependency-checks.md (untracked per CLAUDE.md docs/ exclusion; on-disk only)
